message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: I need to add fallback_searchpath to FileSystemLoader in loaders.py. This is the only file my feature touches. What file(s) does your feature need? If you also need loaders.py, let's coordinate on non-overlapping edits (e.g., different methods) or I can incorporate your changes too.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My task: add optional path_transform callable param to loader classes (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) in loaders.py, applied before path resolution. What file(s) does your feature touch? If you also need loaders.py, let's split by section/class or take turns.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both need loaders.py, so a disjoint file split isn't possible. My change touches FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader with a small, non-invasive addition: an optional path_transform param applied as the very first step in each loader's get_source (transform the template name before any resolution logic, including your fallback_searchpath lookups). To avoid clobbering, let's serialize instead of editing concurrently: I'll go first since my edit is small and additive (new __init__ param + one-line transform call at top of get_source in each class), then send DONE. You then layer fallback_searchpath on top of the already-transformed logic. Does that order work for you, or would you rather go first? Either order should compose fine since my change is just a pass-through hook before existing resolution logic runs.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed: we both touch loaders.py since our features live in FileSystemLoader. To minimize conflict: I'll only touch FileSystemLoader.__init__ (add fallback_searchpath param + storage), get_source (fallback search loop), and list_templates (merge fallback templates). I won't touch DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader or add any path_transform logic - that's all yours. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Sounds good - you go first (path_transform hook + __init__ param across the loader classes), send DONE when finished, then I'll layer fallback_searchpath into FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates on top of your changes. I will not touch other loader classes or path_transform logic. Waiting for your DONE now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Confirmed. I'll add path_transform to BaseLoader-level classes (DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) plus FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source, keeping edits additive and re-reading the file before each edit to avoid clobbering your concurrent FileSystemLoader work. Will send DONE when finished.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished path_transform: added optional path_transform param to FileSystemLoader (last positional-with-default param, after followlinks), PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Transform is applied at the very start of each get_source (and PrefixLoader.get_loader / ChoiceLoader.load for the delegation paths), original untransformed name is preserved for TemplateNotFound errors. In FileSystemLoader.__init__ I only added a new trailing param + one  line, and in get_source added two lines at top (original = template; transform) plus changed the final  to use . Should be a small, easy-to-rebase diff for your fallback_searchpath work. Go ahead and layer your changes on FileSystemLoader now - tests pass (pytest tests/test_loader.py, 40 passed).

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished path_transform: added optional path_transform param to FileSystemLoader (trailing param after followlinks), PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Transform applied at the very start of each get_source (and PrefixLoader.get_loader / ChoiceLoader.load for the delegation paths); original untransformed name is preserved for TemplateNotFound errors. In FileSystemLoader.__init__ I only added a new trailing param plus one assignment line; in get_source I added two lines at the top (save original, apply transform) and changed the final TemplateNotFound raise to use the saved original name. Should be a small, easy-to-rebase diff for your fallback_searchpath work. Go ahead and layer your changes on FileSystemLoader now - tests pass, pytest tests/test_loader.py: 40 passed.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished fallback_searchpath: added param to FileSystemLoader.__init__ (new trailing param after followlinks, same normalization as searchpath), stored as self.fallback_searchpath (list, empty if None). get_source now iterates self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath (primary still takes priority since it's searched first). list_templates does the same concatenation for discovery, dedup via existing set logic. Only touched FileSystemLoader's docstring/__init__/get_source/list_templates, nothing else in the file. Tests pass (pytest tests/test_loader.py, 40 passed). Diff written to patch.txt. Thanks for coordinating!
